title: Heavy Duty Long Shackle Padlock with Keys, High Security Padlock for Outdoor, Shed, Warehouse, Garage, Garden, Gate - 38mm
features: Padlock is made of alloy material chrome plated outside with hardened shackle, smooth surface,thick lock body, wear resistance, provides safety protection for your valuables
Padlock Size: Shackle diameter-5.8mm, Lock width-38mm, Total height-106mm
Long-term protection:Safety long shackle padlock outdoor with Keys, ideal for indoor and outdoor use, providing long-term protection
Widely used:Padlock great suitable for door locks,large warehouse, storage units, garage, cabinets ,garden shedand more
Package Included: 1 pack padlock, and each padlock with 3 keys
description: Product Description Hard Long Shackle, Smooth Surface Heavy-duty padlock is made of alloy material, the exterior is chrome-plated, with a hard hook ring, and the surface is smooth and not easy to rust. Lock body is thick, wear-resistant and durable The internal structure of the padlock is precise, the lock beam is thick, the lock body is thick, anti-smashing, anti-prying, wear-resistant, durable and anti-corrosion. Safety lock cylinder Safety lock cylinder,key Unlock smoothly, each lock is equipped with three keys as standard, providing long-term protection for your property. Safety padlock with Keys, ideal for indoor and outdoor use.Widely application, perfect for garden, garage, lockers, large warehouse, home or back door to keep belongings safe and secure.
